evidence.source_title: Tehran Prosecutor Saeed Mortazavi to Serve Two-Year Prison Term for Protestor's Death
evidence.description: Mortazavi sentenced to two years imprisonment as accomplice to murder and for the illegal detention of Mohsen Ruholamini at Kahrizak

editorial_notes: Mortazavi ordered the illegal detention that directly led to Ruholamini's death; convicted 2017 specifically for this case
